title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: LA PINE WARMING SHELTER BY THE DOOR AT LA PINE OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. 16430 3rd Street La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with children. Well behaved pets are welcome; pets must remain with owner. Hours: 7 days per week 5pm-7am, Monday, December 1, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 -Meals served from 6pm-7pm Email (541) 948-6649 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 948-6649 Intake Intake (541) 948-6649 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Klamath, and Lake Counties Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Families Extreme Weather Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
